desc.p1: I'm a passionate frontend developer with 4+ years of professional experience, specializing in React, TypeScript, and building responsive, user-friendly interfaces. I enjoy turning complex problems into simple, beautiful, and intuitive features that make the web easier and more enjoyable to use.
desc.p2: Beyond client work, I'm currently designing, building, and operating My Panel App — a live, multi-tenant SaaS booking platform — end-to-end: frontend, backend, infrastructure, and deployment. In other words, I don't just build interfaces, I ship full products from first commit to production.
desc.p3: I'm also pursuing a B.Sc. in Computer Engineering alongside my work, and I have a keen eye for detail — I guarantee that the result of my work matches the provided UI design, pixel for pixel.

job_1.desc: This company is involved in Insurance Technologies (Insurtech) and offers Content Management Systems (CMS) to insurance firms and agencies. In this position, I collaborate with my team to create efficient and user-friendly admin panels, providing an incredible experience to our customers and helping them manage their tasks and clients as effectively as possible. Additionally, we develop services that allow clients to independently and directly purchase insurance for their belongings, such as cars, cellphones, laptops, and other electronic devices, using our applications.

res.1: - Frontend and Backend Development: Design and development of responsive and user-friendly Single Page Applications (SPAs).
res.2: - Reusable Components & Testing: Development of complex components (e.g., forms, pagination, charts) including unit and integration tests to ensure functionality. / Code Quality & Optimization: Responsibility for the codebase through high standards, documentation, application of best practices, and performance optimization via refactoring. Maintenance and refactoring of legacy code.
res.3: - Projects: Development of admin management dashboards for insurance companies (car insurance), as well as an application for checking the technical health of electronic devices such as smartphones and tablets. Additionally, creation of a demo for these projects.

job_2.desc: My Panel App is a live, multi-tenant SaaS appointment-booking platform I designed and built from scratch for service-based businesses such as salons and clinics. The platform is fully bilingual (Persian/English) with automatic RTL/LTR switching, and I own every layer of the stack — from the React/TypeScript frontend to the Node.js/Express/MongoDB backend and the production infrastructure.

res.1: - Full-Stack Architecture: Built the platform end-to-end with React, TypeScript, Vite, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, including secure authentication via HttpOnly cookies and Axios interceptor-based token refresh.
res.2: - Bilingual & Infrastructure: Engineered a centralized Persian/English translation layer with locale-aware backend middleware, bilingual PDF invoicing with correct RTL typography, and a full deployment pipeline across Cloudflare, Vercel, Render, Supabase, and Resend.
res.3: - Product Ownership: Solved real production issues spanning networking, file uploads, and dynamic calendar scheduling (FullCalendar) while operating the live product solo.

edu_0.desc: Currently studying for my Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering at Eyvanekey University, alongside running My Panel App as a self-employed full-stack developer. Coursework covers data structures and algorithms, discrete mathematics, formal language theory, electrical circuits, and differential equations — the theoretical foundation behind the production systems I build day to day.

edu_1.desc: This online bootcamp was a part-time program that I completed alongside my full-time job as an SEO specialist. During this course, I learned web technologies and how to develop web applications. I gained knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, as well as React and TypeScript. Additionally, I learned how to manage and maintain codebases using GitHub, which is one of the most important aspects of development, especially in a team. Through this course, I also acquired fundamental backend development skills, including Node.js, MongoDB, Mongoose, MySQL, and Express.js. have created amazing user interfaces and successfully accelerated my learning through small projects and hands-on experience.

edu_2.desc: I spent 4 successful years in high school and graduated with excellent grades. In fact, the school I attended is not a regular school. Students must pass an entrance exam to be granted permission to study at this high school.

saas.title: React / Node — My Panel App — Multi-Tenant SaaS Booking Platform
saas.description:
My Panel App is a live, multi-tenant SaaS appointment-booking platform that I designed, built, and operate end-to-end for service-based businesses such as salons and clinics. It is fully bilingual (Persian/English) with automatic RTL/LTR switching, and I own every layer of the stack — frontend, backend, infrastructure, and deployment.
#Features
- Multi-tenant booking system with admin-controlled business panels
- Bilingual UI (Persian/English) with automatic RTL/LTR switching
- Secure authentication with HttpOnly cookies and automatic token refresh
- Dynamic scheduling calendar (FullCalendar) with real-time availability
- Bilingual PDF invoice generation with correct Persian RTL typography
- Custom domain, DNS, and a full production deployment pipeline
saas.tech: - React, TypeScript, Vite, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS, Axios, Cloudflare, Vercel, Render, Supabase, Resend
